author: anon-59ff128d
content:
Repurposing this issue for a test-suite hardening pass. Crosslink create path is currently failing with FOREIGN KEY constraint errors (issues #82-84 all failed to persist). Scope:

1. Remove ~25 tautological tests across operation.rs / request.rs / error.rs / undo.rs / schema.rs / diff.rs that test the serde framework rather than our logic.

2. Add proptest-based adversarial tests to ripsed-core/src/engine.rs (apply+undo roundtrip, line-count preservation, no-match returns None, CRLF majority preservation).

3. Add proptest-based tests to ripsed-core/src/matcher.rs (literal-match equivalence to str::contains, pathological patterns bounded).

4. Add real AtomicBatch partial-failure rollback test in ripsed-fs/src/writer.rs (currently only tests drop-without-commit; not the actual phase-3 rollback code path).

5. Add concurrent-write hammer integration test in crates/ripsed/tests/ to verify ripsed::apply_to_file's read-modify-write locking (the raison d'être of the facade crate added in 0.2.7).

6. Add symlink-scope safety tests to ripsed-fs/src/discovery.rs (Unix-only).

7. Add CLI JSON error-contract tests hardening the agent protocol.

8. Fix write_atomic permission preservation test gap.
